title: calea uniflora var. uniflora
intro: Calea uniflora var. uniflora, also known as Mexican Damiana, is a plant species in the Asteraceae family native to Mexico. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to act as a natural sedative and relaxant, due to its rich content of flavonoids, alkaloids, and terpenoids. The health benefits of Calea uniflora var. uniflora include relief from anxiety, insomnia, and menstrual cramps, as well as its potential to improve cognitive function and memory. Calea uniflora var. uniflora can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and capsules, which are often used in traditional medicine to promote relaxation and overall well-being.
